issues.title: Setting delegateAgent to a different agent than acpAgent crashes master process (wta-master pipe connect failure)
issues.suggested_reply:
Sorry you hit a crash @Aust-aa-36. For crashes specifically we need the
backend diagnostic data, which you can capture via Feedback Hub:
<https://aka.ms/intelligent-terminal-feedback>. Pick the matching
category, hit "Share My Feedback" after submitting, and paste the link
here.

I can also see the startup failure text you included: <!-- from body -->helper ACP transport failed: connect to master pipe '\\.\pipe\wta-master-<GUID>' after 21 attempt(s): The system cannot find the file specified. (os error 2)<!-- /from body -->.

Without the Feedback Hub data we can't correlate the crash to a specific stack trace.

PS: If you can also zip and attach `%LOCALAPPDATA%\Packages\*IntelligentTerminal*\LocalCache\Local\IntelligentTerminal\logs\` (or `%LOCALAPPDATA%\IntelligentTerminal\logs\` for unpackaged dev builds) after reproducing, that may help confirm why `wta-master` exits before the helper connects.

issues.title: Improve Copilot auth flow after install
Stucked on loading
issues.suggested_reply:
Hi @MartinSusky, thanks for the screenshot. I can see <!-- from image -->"launch session • Esc to exit"<!-- /from image --> while the agent pane is showing garbled output. To debug why the Claude session never leaves loading, could you add:

1. Your Windows build number.
2. Whether `claude` runs successfully from a normal shell outside Terminal.
3. A zipped WTA log from `%LOCALAPPDATA%\Packages\*IntelligentTerminal*\LocalCache\Local\IntelligentTerminal\logs\` after reproducing it.

Once that's in, we'll re-triage this within 2 business days.
